name: digclaw-skill
summary: Clarifies that frontend/backend source bindings are developer maintenance metadata and normal skill updates use the skill version only.

source_bindings.user_update_policy: Users and agents should update this skill by comparing VERSION.json.version only. Source bindings must not block installation or updates.

backend.worktree: commit bound; untracked ruoyi-modules/vc-chat/tweitter/__pycache__/ was present locally and is not part of the binding
